verdict_reasoning: HSPA1A encodes the inducible cytosolic Hsp70 chaperone. Canonically it is cytoplasmic/nuclear, but a well-documented literature shows that under heat shock, cellular stress, and oncogenic transformation, Hsp70 (HSP72) is translocated to the outer leaflet of the plasma membrane — particularly on tumor cells — where it acts as a recognition signal for NK cells and serves as a target for antibody-based and CAR-T approaches. This cancer-cell-restricted ecto-Hsp70 pool is wash-resistant and constitutes genuine surface display. Thus verdict is contextual via cell_state_induced (stress/oncogenic transformation).
